description: Shared Spark runtime configuration — defines Python/R libraries, Spark properties, and compute pool settings. Changes are staged first, then published. Attach to notebooks and Spark job definitions to control their execution environment.
notes: Changes are staged first, then published as separate step
Publish is fire-and-forget: POST .../staging/publish with empty body
Library upload: POST .../staging/libraries/{libraryName} with octet-stream body
Cancel publish available if publish is in progress
